finalCta.description: Join the boat marketplace that puts you first. Zero fees. Real boats. Real connections.

matchPage.metadataDescription: Tell us your dream boat and our AI will match you with the best listings, even when you do not know exactly what you are looking for.
matchPage.heroDescription: Tell us your dream boat and our AI will match you with the best listings, even when you do not know exactly what you are looking for.
matchPage.heroFootnote: Your buyer profile and shortlist stay attached to your account, so you can come back later and keep narrowing the field without starting over.
matchPage.faqHeading: Questions buyers usually ask before they start matching
matchPage.faqSubtitle: These are the practical questions we see most often from buyers using OnlyHulls to narrow the market quickly.
matchPage.finalDescription: Create a free account, chat with our AI, and see your matches in minutes.

one.title: Tell Us Your Dream
one.description: Chat with our AI to build your buyer profile. It learns what you need - budget, size, sailing style, and even the things you have not thought through yet.

two.title: Get Matched
two.description: Our engine scores every listing against your profile using AI similarity and smart filters. Best matches float to the top.

three.title: Connect Directly
three.description: Found the one? Connect directly with the seller. No brokers, no middlemen, and no 10% commission eating into the deal.

one.title: Learns What You Want
one.description: The AI builds a rich profile from a natural conversation, not a tedious form. It picks up on preferences you might not realize you have.

two.title: Scores Every Listing
two.description: Every boat gets a match percentage based on your profile. Sort by match score to see what fits you best.

three.title: Private and Secure
three.description: Your profile is yours. Sellers see your interest, not your data. You control when and how you connect.

four.title: Zero Commission
four.description: We do not take a cut of your deal. Matching is free. Premium features are optional.

one.title: Takes a couple of minutes
one.description: Start with a short chat instead of a long form. The AI builds your buyer profile from that conversation.

two.title: Your results stay saved
two.description: Matches, shortlist signals, and your buyer profile stay attached to your account when you come back.

three.title: Direct seller contact
three.description: When you are ready, you connect directly with the seller. No broker commission is added by OnlyHulls.

stackSignals.smartMatchingValue: Rules, shortlist signals, and buyer filters are still doing the heavy lifting.
stackSignals.semanticOnValue: Profile similarity is running through {provider} embeddings.
stackSignals.specRankingValue: Budget, size, location, and boat-type filters stay in the scoring mix.
stackSignals.savedValue: Come back anytime to sort by price, size, year, or newest without starting over.

one.question: How does OnlyHulls decide what is a good match?
one.answer: OnlyHulls combines your buyer profile, boat type, budget, specs, location signals, and AI-assisted ranking to score listings. Stronger matches rise to the top, but you can still browse the full market yourself.

two.question: Do I have to know the exact make and model I want?
two.answer: No. The matching flow is built for buyers who know the lifestyle, budget, and mission more than the exact boat. The AI uses those signals to surface likely fits and explain the tradeoffs.

three.question: Can I still sort and browse boats manually after I get matched?
three.answer: Yes. Your matches are saved, and you can still sort by price, size, year, and listing date while comparing listings across the broader inventory.

four.question: What do I get with Buyer Plus?
four.answer: Buyer Plus unlocks longer-term AI matching, unlimited saves, better shortlist tools, and saved-search alerts over a 90-day period while keeping direct contact with sellers commission-free.

sellPage.metadataDescription: List your boat on OnlyHulls. No commissions, no brokers, and direct contact with AI-matched buyers worldwide.
sellPage.heroDescription: Show us your hull. List your boat for free and let our AI connect you with qualified buyers worldwide. No brokers, no middlemen, and no percentage of your sale.
sellPage.faqHeading: The practical questions sellers ask before they list
sellPage.faqSubtitle: These answers make the commercial model clearer for owners deciding whether to list on OnlyHulls.
sellPage.finalDescription: Create a free account and list your boat in minutes. No credit card required.
sellPage.stepFootnote: AI-assisted listing polish and presentation cleanup are included on higher-tier seller plans.

one.title: Create Your Listing
one.description: Enter your boat's details - make, model, specs, condition, and price. Our guided wizard walks you through it step by step.

two.title: Add Photos
two.description: Upload photos to showcase your boat. Great photos get more interest, and we help you lead with the strongest ones.

three.title: AI Does the Work
three.description: Our AI analyzes your listing, tags it with character traits such as bluewater, liveaboard, and race-ready, and matches it with qualified buyers. Featured and Broker plans also get AI help cleaning up listing copy, structure, and presentation.

four.title: Connect with Buyers
four.description: When a buyer is interested, you connect directly. No broker in the middle and no commission on the sale.

one.title: $0 Commission
one.description: Keep every dollar of your sale. We never take a cut, and listing plus matching start free.

two.title: Global Reach
two.description: Your listing is visible to buyers worldwide. AI matching helps the right buyers find you, not just the local ones.

three.title: You Stay in Control
three.description: You decide who to talk to and when. No cold calls from brokers and no pressure to accept lowball offers.

four.title: List in Minutes
four.description: Our step-by-step wizard makes it fast. Enter the basics, add photos, and go live.

one.question: Do I need to pay before I can create a listing?
one.answer: No. You can create a listing for free, get it into draft or review, and decide later whether to stay on the free tier or upgrade into a 90-day paid seller plan.

two.question: What does the AI actually do for sellers?
two.answer: OnlyHulls analyzes the listing, tags it for buyer intent, and helps route it toward the right buyers. Higher-tier seller plans also include AI help cleaning up listing copy, structure, and presentation.

three.question: How long does a paid seller plan last?
three.answer: Creator and Featured Creator plans are billed for 90 days at a time, which gives sellers a longer listing window without feeling like a month-to-month subscription trap.

four.question: Do you take a commission when my boat sells?
four.answer: No. OnlyHulls does not take a broker-style commission. You keep the sale proceeds and connect directly with buyers.

aboutPage.metadataDescription: OnlyHulls is an AI-powered boat marketplace built for real boat lovers.
aboutPage.heading: About OnlyHulls
aboutPage.intro: OnlyHulls is a boat marketplace built by people who actually love boats. We use AI to help buyers find the right boat faster and help sellers reach qualified, serious buyers.
aboutPage.problem: The boat buying process is broken. Listings are scattered across dozens of broker sites. Specs are inconsistent. Photos are terrible. And you have no idea if a boat actually fits what you need until you've spent hours researching it.
aboutPage.solution: We're fixing that by aggregating listings from the best broker sites, enriching them with AI-extracted specifications, and matching buyers to boats based on their actual needs - not just price and location.

matching.title: AI-Powered Matching
matching.description: Tell us what you want. Our AI profiles your needs and ranks every boat in our catalog by how well it fits.

commission.title: Zero Commission
commission.description: Browsing, searching, and contacting sellers is always free. We charge for AI intelligence, not for connecting people.

boats.title: Real Boats Only
boats.description: Every listing is sourced from verified brokers or submitted by real owners. No bait-and-switch. No ghost listings.

aboutPage.contactDescription: Questions, feedback, or partnership inquiries? Reach us at

privacyPage.metadataDescription: How OnlyHulls collects, uses, and protects your data.
privacyPage.heading: Privacy Policy

informationCollected.title: 1. Information We Collect
informationCollected.accountData: Account data: email address, display name, and encrypted password when you register.
informationCollected.buyerProfile: Buyer profile: boat preferences, budget range, experience level, and location preferences when you complete the AI matching questionnaire.
informationCollected.usageData: Usage data: pages visited, boats viewed, search queries, and contact clicks to help us improve the Platform and provide better recommendations.

items.one: To provide AI-powered boat matching and recommendations
items.two: To connect buyers with sellers and broker listings
items.three: To send transactional emails (verification, password reset, match notifications)
items.four: To improve our search, matching algorithms, and user experience
items.five: To detect and prevent fraud or abuse

sharing.title: 3. Data Sharing
sharing.intro: We do not sell your personal data. We share data only with:
sharing.seller: Sellers: your name and email when you initiate contact (with your consent)
sharing.providers: Service providers: email delivery (Resend), payment processing (Stripe), and hosting infrastructure
sharing.legal: Legal requirements: when required by law or to protect our rights

security.title: 4. Data Security
security.body: Passwords are hashed with bcrypt. All connections use HTTPS/TLS encryption. Payment processing is handled by Stripe - we never store credit card numbers.

rights.title: 5. Your Rights
rights.body: You can request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time by contacting us. You can delete your account from the account settings page.

cookies.title: 6. Cookies
cookies.body: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. We use anonymous session identifiers to track browsing patterns for improving recommendations. We do not use third-party advertising cookies.

contact.title: 7. Contact
contact.body: For privacy questions or data requests, contact us at

termsPage.metadataDescription: Terms of service for using the OnlyHulls boat marketplace.
termsPage.heading: Terms of Service

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: By accessing or using OnlyHulls ("the Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the Platform.

service.title: 2. Description of Service
service.body: OnlyHulls is an AI-powered boat marketplace that connects buyers and sellers. We aggregate listings from third-party brokers and provide tools for direct listings. OnlyHulls does not own, inspect, or guarantee any vessel listed on the Platform.

accounts.title: 3. User Accounts
accounts.body: You must provide accurate information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials. You must be at least 18 years old to use the Platform.

transactions.title: 4. Listings & Transactions
transactions.body: Sellers are solely responsible for the accuracy of their listings, including pricing, specifications, condition, and photographs. OnlyHulls does not participate in, mediate, or guarantee any transaction between buyers and sellers. All purchases are made directly between the parties involved.

thirdParty.title: 5. Third-Party Listings
thirdParty.body: Many listings on OnlyHulls are sourced from third-party broker websites. We provide links to these original listings as a convenience. OnlyHulls is not responsible for the accuracy, availability, or content of third-party listings.

ai.title: 6. AI Features
ai.body: OnlyHulls uses artificial intelligence for buyer profiling, boat matching, and listing analysis. AI-generated recommendations and scores are for informational purposes only and should not be the sole basis for purchasing decisions. Always conduct your own due diligence, including independent surveys and inspections.

liability.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
liability.body: OnlyHulls is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any damages arising from your use of the Platform, including but not limited to losses from transactions, inaccurate listings, or AI recommendations.

contact.title: 8. Contact
contact.body: For questions about these terms, contact us at

notFound.title: Lost at Sea
notFound.description: This page doesn't exist - or the listing has been removed.
